summary: Phase 14 RM Customer Communication Hub - Complete Testing. Backend: 21/21 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core features verified working. Communication Console with contact card, quick actions (Call/WhatsApp/Email), secondary actions (Template/Note/Log Call/Follow-up), timeline, and modals all functional.

P2_polish.issue: Template button disabled when no phone number
P2_polish.details: Template button is correctly disabled when lead has no phone number, but this is expected behavior since templates are primarily for WhatsApp. Not a bug.

tests.test: POST with outcome='visit_requested' prompts stage advance
POST with outcome='not_interested' prompts mark lost
Lead summary fields updated after communication log
RM pipeline dashboard loads with leads
RM Dashboard shows communication urgency strip with 4 pills
RM pipeline dashboard loads with leads (14 leads found)
RM Lead Detail page shows Comms tab as default active
Communication Console shows quick action buttons (Call, WhatsApp, Email)
Communication Console shows secondary actions (Template, Log Note, Log Call, Follow-up)
Disabled state for channels without phone/email
Communication Timeline section shows entries after logging
Call Outcome modal opens with 12 outcome options
Call Outcome modal has note field

critical_code_review_comments: Communication module properly stores data on leads collection (communications[] array + summary fields)
Templates seeded at startup with 8 defaults - working correctly
Dashboard counts endpoint correctly aggregates communication statuses
Workflow prompts (schedule_follow_up, advance_stage, mark_lost) working based on outcomes
RM access control properly enforced via rm_id check
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 14 Communication Hub fully tested. All backend APIs working (templates, dashboard-counts, log, timeline, follow-up, status). Frontend Communication Console verified with contact card, quick actions, secondary actions, timeline, and modals. Template button correctly disabled when no phone number. All regression tests pass (RM login, pipeline, conversion, execution, settlement).

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real - no mocking.
